Ring-Packed Radial Browser

Experimental radial view with slot assignment. Hue still runs around the wheel and chroma still expands outward, but swatches are placed on discrete rings so the natural adjacency stays while overlap drops.

L90-100 2764 L80-90 5050 L70-80 3676 L60-70 2981 L50-60 2546 L40-50 2181 L30-40 1756 L20-30 387 L0-20 23

Every Color We Have So Far

This version keeps the radial LCH logic that felt good, but uses discrete ring slots instead of free-floating scatter points. That should preserve the nice color adjacency while reducing collisions.
